page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 31.0 GB of system memory. The instance includes a dedicated NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM based on the Turing architecture. It does not include local storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Benchmark results show a contrast between general-purpose CPU performance and GPU-driven workloads. Single-core CPU performance is relatively weak, placing in the bottom 25% for stress-ng and Geekbench tests. Multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth fall into the average tier. However, the integrated NVIDIA T4 GPU delivers strong performance in machine learning tasks, achieving top-tier results in prompt processing for both small and medium language models, and strong performance in medium model text generation.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this instance serves as an entry-level GPU platform. By pairing a budget-friendly NVIDIA T4 GPU with moderate CPU and memory resources, it avoids the high costs associated with larger GPU clusters. The main tradeoff is the lack of local storage and the weaker single-threaded CPU performance, which makes it less suitable for heavy CPU-bound serial processing or high-throughput local disk operations.

The ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is optimized for GPU-accelerated workloads such as low-latency AI inference, small-to-medium large language model serving, and basic machine learning tasks. It is also suitable for lightweight video transcoding and CUDA-based parallel processing where massive CPU performance is not the primary bottleneck.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for entry-level machine learning and parallel computing workloads. It features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs operating at 2.5 GHz, 31.0 GB of system memory, and a single NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage and relies on network-attached storage, supported by a 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. While synthetic CPU benchmarks indicate weak single-core and average multi-core performance, the integrated Turing-architecture GPU excels in machine learning inference, delivering top-tier prompt processing speeds for small and medium language models. This hardware profile offers a cost-effective entry point for GPU acceleration, making it highly suitable for AI inference, lightweight CUDA processing, and model deployment workloads that do not require high-performance CPU cores or local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 31 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB VRAM, optimized for cost-effective AI inference and parallel computing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 8 Intel vCPUs, 31 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU for AI inference workloads.
tagline: A cost-effective GPU-accelerated instance featuring an NVIDIA T4 GPU for efficient machine learning inference and parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 31 GB of system memory
NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM for hardware acceleration
Top-tier prompt processing performance for small and medium LLMs
No local storage, utilizing network-attached storage options
Best suited for AI inference, model serving, and lightweight CUDA tasks
